title: Primary Inspection: Purpose of Visit
situation: An officer asks why you are entering the country and how long you will stay.
userGoal: Give clear, short facts about your plan without guessing extra details.
pressureQuestion: What is the purpose of your visit?
avoidSaying: I don't know, maybe tourism or business.
I will just see what happens.
safePhrases: I am here for a conference from May 20 to May 24.
Could you repeat the question slowly, please?
betterAnswer: I'm visiting for a design conference and returning on Monday. I can show my return ticket.

title: Secondary Inspection: Stay Calm and Organized
situation: You are sent to secondary inspection and asked follow-up questions about your plans and documents.
userGoal: Respond politely, confirm what is being asked, and answer one point at a time.
pressureQuestion: Why are your travel dates different from your first answer?
avoidSaying: I can make up a better date.
safePhrases: Let me check my itinerary so I can answer accurately.
I may have spoken too quickly. My return date is June 3.
betterAnswer: Thanks for the question. I want to be precise, so I'll check the booking email now. My return flight is June 3 at 6 p.m.

title: Unclear Officer Question: Ask for Clarification
situation: You do not fully understand an officer's fast question about your accommodation.
userGoal: Ask for clarification naturally before answering.
safePhrases: Sorry, could you say that one more time?
Do you mean the hotel name or full address?
betterAnswer: Could you repeat that please? If you mean the address, I'm staying at Lakeview Hotel on Pine Street.
